name: Macaroni & Cheese with Vegetables
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to boil; cook pasta until al dente.
2. While pasta is cooking, in a medium saucepan, melt 2 tablespoons margarine.
3. Remove from heat; add flour and stir until blended in. Whisk in stock and milk, stirring over medium heat until the mixture comes to a boil and thickens. Reduce heat to low. Stir in cheeses and seasonings.
4. Continue stirring until cheese is melted. Remove from heat and set aside.
5. In a large skillet, melt remaining 1 tablespoon margarine. Add remaining ingredients. Cook vegetables, stirring constantly, for about 5 minutes, until tender/crispy. Reduce heat to low.
6. When noodles are done, drain well. Toss with vegetables; stir in cheese sauce. Garnish with scallion curls.
